name: Mini Chip Cheesecake Cookies
recipeIngredient: 3 Packages Cream Cheese, Softened (8 oz Each)
1 Can Sweetened Condensed Milk (14 oz Can)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker crumbs, sugar, cocoa powder, and butter until well blended.
2. Press an even amount of the mixture onto the bottoms of lightly buttered mini muffin tins.
3. Melt one cup of the chocolate chips and set aside to cool.
4. In a mixer, beat the cream cheese until fluffy.
5. Gradually beat in the condensed milk and melted chocolate until smooth.
6. Add the eggs and vanilla extract, and mix thoroughly.
7. Spoon the batter into the prepared cups.
8. Top with remaining chocolate chips.
9. Bake in a preheated 300°F oven for about 15 to 20 minutes or until set.
10. Let cool and refrigerate.
